_comment: Memory MCP Server — persistent knowledge graph for storing and retrieving information across sessions.
No API keys required. Data is stored locally in a JSON file.
Install: Copy the 'memory' key into .mcp.json under mcpServers.

_available: create_entities      — Create new entities in the knowledge graph
add_observations     — Add observations/facts to existing entities
delete_entities      — Remove entities and their relations
delete_observations  — Remove specific observations from entities
read_graph           — Read the entire knowledge graph
search_nodes         — Search for entities by name, type, or content
open_nodes           — Retrieve specific entities by name

use_cases: Remember project architecture decisions across sessions
Track which files have been reviewed or modified
Store user preferences and conventions discovered during work
Maintain a map of the codebase structure
Remember previous debugging sessions and their outcomes

data_model.entities: Named nodes with a type and list of observations (facts)
data_model.observations: String facts attached to entities (e.g., 'Uses connection pooling')
